content.en:
Ye Tian's accumulation at the galaxy level was already enough, not only had his physical body been raised to the limit, but the Chaos Ancient Realm in his body had also expanded to the limit, and it was difficult to continue to expand.

Moreover, his Chaos Ancient Realm is the potential of the Heavenly Realm, which basically does not affect the potential problem, and the real accumulation is basically fixed after the Great God level and the galaxy level, and only at the peak of the galaxy level does it need to be accumulated again.

In addition, Ye Tian's immortal soul had already reached the mid-stage limit of the underworld, which was equivalent to the galaxy-level limit, if he continued to improve, he would inevitably break the shackles and no longer be able to suppress the realm.

So, no matter what, he couldn't delay any longer.

Impacting the galaxy level is inevitable!

However, when it hit the galaxy level, Ye Tian needed to withstand the bombardment of fifteen thunder tribulations, and each thunder tribulation far exceeded the previous thunder tribulation, and such a thunder tribulation movement was very large, and it would even affect many galaxies.

Therefore, Ye Tian must not be in an ordinary place, otherwise he will not be able to hide from other people at all, and once it leaks to other alien races, it will be a big trouble.

Before, the only person among the alien races who knew Ye Tian's true combat power was the Immortal Allah, and the Immortal Allah had long died in the world of the Broken Abyss, and could not be resurrected at all.

Therefore, for the time being, other races do not know Ye Tian's true combat power, even if they know that Ye Tian is a heaven-rebellious, but it is very difficult for the heaven-defying person to become the supreme, such as the immortal Allah, who has been staying at the galaxy level for a long time, and does not dare to impact the cosmic god realm.

Therefore, as long as Ye Tian did not reach the realm of the cosmic gods, the cosmic super clans such as the gods and demons actually did not attach importance to him.

But if the situation of his crossing of the calamity leaked out, showing a combat power far beyond that of the Immortal Allah, it would be absolutely troublesome, and the Protoss would probably kill him at all costs.

"You have to find a safe place!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Terran Supreme Hall is indeed a relatively safe place, but if he has already left the Terran Supreme Palace, and then continues to enter the Terran Supreme Hall to cross the tribulation, this is not good!

"Go to the edge of the universe!"

Ye Tian decided.

There is nothing at the edge of the universe, there are no galaxies, and it is difficult to detect it if you are there.

And the edge of the disk is the edge of the universe, where the area is very large, and it is definitely a good place to cross the tribulation.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian disguised himself alone and returned to the domain.

However, he didn't go to see anyone in the Circle, but went directly through the Plate and went to the edge of the universe.

......

The edge of the universe.

Ye Tian found an area at random, put away the spaceship, sat cross-legged, and after adjusting his mood, he was ready to attack the galaxy level.

The galaxy-level impact on the galaxy level is to transform the world in the body into a starry sky scene.

When Ye Tian had just broken through to the galaxy level before, the time in his body was only equivalent to a planet plus a piece of void space, so that a chaotic ancient realm comparable to ordinary galaxies had been formed.

And now, his Chaos Ancient Realm is no longer a simple world, but a huge galaxy, with planets located in the void, and the main world is the Chaos Ancient Realm continent.

If you want to hit the galaxy level, you must break the limit of the world and transform the Chaos Ancient Realm into a real starry world, just like the galaxy world, countless stars are twinkling, and many continents are suspended in the void, comparable to a small star field.

Such a world is the galaxy-level Chaos Ancient Realm!

And the inner world of the Cosmic God Realm is no longer a world, but a small universe.

Of course, it is incomparable to the real universe, but the small universe is still a universe, but it is incomparably small.

"Let's start breaking through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he kept running the exercises, impacting the world barriers of the Chaos Ancient Realm, and controlling the immortal power in his body to keep impacting.

Soon, the barriers of the world cracked.

Rumble!!!!

The world began to metamorphose, breaking through the realm of incomparable.

After all, Ye Tian's talent was very high, it was a supreme cultivation talent, surpassing the talents of those supremes.

Therefore, Ye Tian's breakthrough realm is extremely simple, there is no bottleneck, and there is no difficulty.

Wow!

With a wave of Ye Tian's hand, countless resources such as divine crystals and chaos crystals were scattered around, which were absorbed into Ye Tian's body to ensure a smooth breakthrough process.

He is not short of resources now, so he is not distressed at all.

At the moment of breakthrough in cultivation, Ye Tian's immortal soul also began to break through, and easily reached the late stage realm of the underworld.

Soon, Ye Tian's cultivation officially stepped into the first order of the galaxy level, although he was not yet stable, he was already a cultivator of the first order of the galaxy level.

And at this moment, a thunderstorm cloud appeared in the void.

The area of this thunderstorm cloud is unimaginably large, almost comparable to the area of several galaxies.

And the breath on the thunder tribulation is enough to be feared by other galaxy levels, and a wisp of breath is enough to suppress the ordinary galaxy level, and even ordinary cosmic gods dare not resist the power of this thunder tribulation.

"At the beginning, Immortal Allah estimated that in order to survive the star-level thunder tribulation, he paid a huge price, and the Protoss estimated that he also invested countless resources in Immortal Allah, but unfortunately Allah was killed by me, and the Protoss didn't know how distressed it was!"

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian smiled happily.

Rumble!!!

The first thunderstorm struck.

Ye Tian stood there motionless, relying purely on his own defense to shake this first thunder tribulation.

Immediately, the second thunder tribulation and the third thunder tribulation ...... One by one, they landed and bombarded Ye Tian's body.

Until the tenth thunder tribulation, Ye Tiancai was a little more serious, and he casually smashed the pillar of the thunder tribulation.

Finally......

"The fifteenth and final thunder tribulation has come!"

Ye Tian watched the Pillar of Thunder Tribulation descend above and slashed it with a gentle sword.

"Sky Moon Knife!

Rumble!!!

The Thunder Tribulation was directly split by Ye Tian, and even the Thunder Tribulation Cloud was split out of a big hole.

Wow!!!

The Thunder Tribulation Cloud has dissipated, representing that Ye Tian has officially survived the Thunder Tribulation Cloud!

At the same time, Ye Tian's state was also recovering at an incredible speed, and the strength in his body was also growing at a slow rate.

"Stabilize the realm!"

Ye Tian closed his eyes and began to breathe, stabilizing the galaxy-level realm.

Time passed slowly, and a year passed in the blink of an eye.

A year later.

Ye Tian opened his eyes at this time, at this time, he not only completely stabilized the realm, but also sorted out the Chaos Ancient Realm, otherwise the Chaos Ancient Realm that had just finished its transformation would be very chaotic, which was not conducive to the cultivation in the future.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he left here in a spaceship and returned to the Sanctuary Tianlan Giant City.

As soon as he came back, he announced to the outside world that he had reached the galaxy-level realm.

And with this news coming out, Tiange's reputation became even greater.

After all, today's Heavenly Pavilion not only has Ye Tian, a galaxy-level commander, but also a number of galaxy-level.

Besides, Ye Tian, a galaxy-level who is more powerful than the cosmic gods, naturally cannot be regarded as an ordinary galaxy-level, it can be said that Tiange's current status is equivalent to the overlord-level force of a star field, and it is no longer a small force in Tianlan Giant City, but a medium force.

And as the reputation of Tiange gradually appeared, many people chose to join Tiange, making Tiange more and more brilliant.

In the third year after Ye Tian came back, a message was delivered to Ye Tian.

"Tianlan Giant City Power Meeting!"

Ye Tian looked at this invitation and was silent.
